name: Sauerkraut Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain sauerkraut and rinse well in cold water, squeezing dry and separating lumps.
2. Discard cabbage core and shred the sauerkraut fine.
3. Place both the shredded sauerkraut and sauerkraut juice into a large kettle.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of butter or bacon fat in a skillet, cook onion until translucent.
5. Add celery and garlic to the skillet, cooking until softened.
6. Transfer contents of skillet to the kettle with the sauerkraut mixture.
7. Add tomatoes, beef, stock, salt, and pepper; bring to a boil.
8. Simmer for about two hours, skimming foam and scum as needed.
9. Stir in lemon juice, sugar, and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Cook the remaining tablespoon of fat with flour until golden brown.
11. Stir the flour mixture into the soup; cook for another 20 minutes.
12. To serve, shred meat over a bowl, discard bones.
13. Sprinkle parsley and dill over the shredded meat.
14. Pour the hot soup over the meat and garnish with sour cream.
